sql_array: CREATE TABLE retention_test_simple(date Date, uid Int32) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO retention_test_simple SELECT '2020-01-01', number FROM numbers(3);
SELECT uid, retention(date = '2020-01-01') AS r FROM retention_test_simple GROUP BY uid;
UPDATE retention_test_simple SET uid = uid + 1 WHERE date = '2020-01-01';
SELECT uid, retention(date = '2020-01-01', date = '2020-01-02') AS r FROM retention_test_simple GROUP BY uid ORDER BY r DESC;
